zh.Gräfenhausen, Neuenbürg, Schwarzwaldkrei: 德國爾特波格比格格雷分豪森
zh.lifeSummary: 當Conrad Kern or Kearns於1515年出生在德國爾特波格比格格雷分豪森時，他的父親Conradt Kern38歲，母親Mrs. Conradt Kern38歲。他於1534年與Barbara Simon在德國巴登-爾特波格恩可萊斯斯特勞本哈特奧頓豪森結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於從1580年到1609年10月23日在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Conrad Kern or Kearns于1515年出生在德国爾特波格比格格雷分豪森时，他的父亲Conradt Kern38岁，母亲Mrs. Conradt Kern38岁。他于1534年与Barbara Simon在德国巴登-爾特波格恩可萊斯斯特勞本哈特奧頓豪森结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于从1580年到1609年10月23日在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Kern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, Dutch, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German kerne ‘kernel, seed, pip’; Middle Dutch kern(e), keerne; German Kern or Yiddish kern ‘grain’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a farmer, or a nickname for a physically small person. As a Jewish surname, it is mainly artificial.
English (southeastern): metonymic occupational name for a maker or user of milk churns, from Middle English kern, kirn, kurn, a side-form of chern ‘churn’. Compare Church .
Slovenian: nickname for a stunted person, from an old spelling of krn ‘stunted’.

variants.name: Church
meanings: English: topographic name mostly found in southern and midland England, for someone who lived near a church, or possibly an occupational name for someone who worked at a church, such as a verger or sexton, from Middle English chirche ‘church’. The word comes from Old English cyrice, ultimately from medieval Greek kyrikon, for earlier kyriakōn (dōma) ‘(house) of the Lord’, from kyrios ‘lord’. Compare Kirk .
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Kirch  .

variants.name: Kirn
meanings: German: habitational name from Kirn, a small town in Rhineland-Palatinate, the name of which probably derives from Middle High German kürne ‘mill’.
Slovenian: probably a variant of   Kern  .

variants.name: Keirn
meanings: Irish: variant of   Kern  , a shortened and altered form of   McCarron  .
Possibly also an Americanized form of German   Kern  .

variants.name: Churn
meanings: metonymic occupational name for a maker or user of milk churns, from Middle English chern, chirn, churn ‘churn’. Compare Kern .
probably a variant of Churm, a nickname from Middle English chirm ‘chirping, twittering of birds’ (from Old English ci(e)rm ‘noise’), influenced by the word churn.
English:

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Israeli): from Hebrew or ‘light’, a Hebraicized form of various original Ashkenazic surnames.
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surname 柯, see   Ke   1.
Chinese: Hokkien form of the surname 胡, see   Hu   1.

variants.name: Ke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Heng, Yong, Bin, Song, Yan, Zhi, Cheng, Chih-Ming, Chun-Yen, Fan, Fong, Gang.  Vietnamese Lan, Hai, Hoa, Le Van, Mui, Tuy.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 柯, meaning ‘bough, stalk’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal name Ke Lu (柯盧), personal name of a prince of the state of Wu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ke Ze (柯澤), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) traced back to the Qiang ethnic group in ancient western China and the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) adopted as a surname by the Ke Ba (柯拔) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).
Chinese: variant of   Ge  .

nameMeanings.name: Kearns
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish:
Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Céirín ‘descendant of Céirín’, a personal name from a diminutive of ciar ‘dark, black’, with the addition of English excrescent -s.
in Ulster, possibly a variant of   Cairns  .

variants.name: Cairns
meanings: Scottish (southern): habitational name from the lands of Cairns in Mid Calder (Midlothian).
Irish (Down, Antrim, and Tyrone): in the north of Ireland, there may have been confusion between the Scottish surname and Irish Ó Ciaráin, Anglicized as Kieran and Kearns .

variants.name: Kearn
meanings: Irish:
variant of   Kearns  .
possibly also a variant of   McCarron  .

variants.name: Keirns
meanings: Probably a variant of   Kearns  .

variants.name: Kernes
meanings: Irish: variant of   Kearns  .

variants.name: Karnes
meanings: Irish: variant of   Kearns  .
perhaps also anAmericanized form of Polish Karniesz, a noun derivative ofthe adjective karny ‘obedient’.

variants.name: Kearin
meanings: Irish: variant of   Kearns  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Kearnes
meanings: Irish: variant of   Kearns  .

variants.name: Kerns
meanings: Irish: variant of   Kearns  .
German and Dutch: variant of   Kern  .

variants.name: Kerans
meanings: Irish: variant of   Kearns  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Karns
meanings: Irish: variant of   Kearns  .

nameMeanings.name: Conrad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English spelling of Konrad, a Germanic personal name derived from kuon ‘bold’ + rad ‘counsel’. It was used occasionally in Britain in the Middle Ages in honour of a 10th-century bishop of Constance, but modern use in the English-speaking world is a reimportation from Germany dating mainly from the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Conrad Kern or Kearns was born in 1515, in Gräfenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Germany, his father, Conradt Kern, was 38 and his mother, Mrs. Conradt Kern, was 38. He married Barbara Simon in 1534, in Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died from 1580 to 23 October 1609, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Conrad Kern or Kearns est né en 1515, à Gräfenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Conradt Kern, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Conradt Kern, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Barbara Simon en 1534, à Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé du 1580 au 23 octobre 1609, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Conrad Kern or Kearns 1515 in Gräfenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Conradt Kern 38 und seine Mutter Mrs. Conradt Kern 38. Er hat 1534 in Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland Barbara Simon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb von 1580 bis 23. Oktober 1609 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Conrad Kern or Kearns è nato il nel 1515 nel Gräfenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Germania, il suo padre, Conradt Kern, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Conradt Kern, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Barbara Simon nel 1534, nel Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì da 1580 a 23 ottobre 1609, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Conrad Kern or Kearnsが1515年にドイツウuルッテンバーグネウエンブuルググルaフエンハウセンで生まれた時，父Conradt Kernは38歳，母Mrs. Conradt Kernは38歳であった。1534年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグエンズクレイスストラウベンハートオッテンハウセンでBarbara Simonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼はから1580年まで1609年10月23日に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Conrad Kern or Kearns(이)가 1515년 독일 wu르테버그 니우브u르그 그a펜하우센에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Conradt Kern(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Conradt Kern(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1534년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 즈크레이스 스트라벤하르드트 오텐하우센에서 Barbara Simon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1580년 부터 1609년 10월 23일까지 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Conrad Kern or Kearns nasceu em 1515, em Gräfenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Conradt Kern, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Conradt Kern, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Barbara Simon em 1534, em Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu de 1580 a 23 de outubro de 1609, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Conrad Kern or Kearns родился в 1515 г. в местности грaфенаусен, неуенбuрг, вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Conradt Kern было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Conradt Kern, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Barbara Simon в 1534 г. в местности оттенаусен, страубенардт, энзкрис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер с 1580 по 23 октября 1609 в его родном городе.

sm.1515–from 1580 to 23 October 1609: 1515–mai le 1580 e o'o I le 23 Oketopa 1609
sm.from 1580 to 23 October 1609: mai le 1580 e o'o I le 23 Oketopa 1609

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Conrad Kern or Kearns nació en 1515, en Gräfenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Conradt Kern, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Mrs. Conradt Kern, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Barbara Simon en 1534, en Ottenhausen, Straubenhardt, Enzkreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió desde 1580 hasta 23 de octubre de 1609, en su pueblo.
